title: Fire Breaks Out at Dominican Republic Resort

source.title: Deadly fire at popular resort in Dominican Republic

segments.title: A Massive Fire
segments.audioText: Tonight, a massive fire at a popular resort in the Dominican Republic, leaving at least one tourist dead.
segments.transcript: Tonight, a massive fire at a popular resort in the Dominican Republic, leaving at least one tourist dead.
segments.translationZh: 今晚，多明尼加共和國一個受歡迎嘅度假村發生大型火災，造成至少一名遊客死亡。

points.label: Tonight, a massive fire
points.explanationZh: 新聞開頭常用 Tonight 帶入最新情況；massive fire 即大型火災。

points.label: at a popular resort
points.explanationZh: at 後面係事發地點；popular resort 即受歡迎嘅度假村。

points.label: leaving at least one tourist dead
points.explanationZh: leaving...dead 係新聞常見結果講法；at least 表示至少。

segments.title: Video From the Beach
segments.audioText: Video circulating online shows flames torching the dry thatched roofs along the beach at the Viva Dominicus resort.
segments.transcript: Video circulating online shows flames torching the dry thatched roofs along the beach at the Viva Dominicus resort.
segments.translationZh: 網上流傳嘅影片顯示，火焰燒着 Viva Dominicus 度假村海灘旁乾燥嘅茅草屋頂。

points.label: Video circulating online
points.explanationZh: circulating online 即喺網上流傳；聽到 Video 就知道係講影像來源。

points.label: shows flames torching
points.explanationZh: shows 後面講影片見到咩；torching 即猛烈燒着。

points.label: dry thatched roofs
points.explanationZh: thatched roofs 係茅草屋頂；dry 解釋點解容易燒。

segments.title: Quickly Spreading
segments.audioText: The fire breaking out Friday afternoon, quickly spreading from one building to another.
segments.transcript: The fire breaking out Friday afternoon, quickly spreading from one building to another.
segments.translationZh: 火災喺星期五下午發生，並且好快由一棟建築蔓延到另一棟。

points.label: breaking out Friday afternoon
points.explanationZh: break out 用嚟講火災、疫情或衝突爆發；Friday afternoon 係時間。

points.label: quickly spreading
points.explanationZh: spreading 即擴散、蔓延；quickly 提示速度好快。

points.label: from one building to another
points.explanationZh: from...to... 係方向結構，表示由一處去另一處。

segments.title: Injuries Unclear
segments.audioText: The total number of injuries remains unclear tonight.
segments.transcript: The total number of injuries remains unclear tonight.
segments.translationZh: 截至今晚，受傷總人數仍然未清楚。

points.label: The total number of injuries
points.explanationZh: total number 即總數；injuries 係受傷個案。

points.label: remains unclear
points.explanationZh: remains 即仍然係；unclear 即未清楚、未確定。

points.label: tonight
points.explanationZh: 句尾 tonight 再次提醒係新聞播出當晚嘅最新情況。

sentences: Tonight, a massive fire at a popular resort in the Dominican Republic, leaving at least one tourist dead.
Video circulating online shows flames torching the dry thatched roofs along the beach at the Viva Dominicus resort.
The fire breaking out Friday afternoon, quickly spreading from one building to another.
The total number of injuries remains unclear tonight.

vocabulary.example: A massive fire damaged several buildings.
vocabulary.translationZh: 一場大型火災損毀咗幾棟建築。

vocabulary.example: The family stayed at a beach resort.
vocabulary.translationZh: 嗰家人住喺一間海灘度假村。

vocabulary.example: Many tourists visit the island every summer.
vocabulary.translationZh: 每年夏天都有好多遊客去嗰個島。

vocabulary.example: A video circulating online showed the scene.
vocabulary.translationZh: 網上流傳嘅一段影片顯示咗現場情況。

vocabulary.example: Firefighters worked to stop the fire from spreading.
vocabulary.translationZh: 消防員努力阻止火勢蔓延。

vocabulary.example: The cause of the fire remains unclear.

phrases.example: The fire broke out at a popular resort.
Video circulating online showed the flames.
The fire breaking out Friday afternoon spread quickly.

phrases.meaningZh: 由一棟建築去到另一棟
phrases.example: The flames spread from one building to another.
The total number of injuries remains unclear.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:18 跟讀第一句，分成 Tonight / a massive fire / at a popular resort / leaving at least one tourist dead。
重播 00:25，先聽寫 Video circulating online，再補 shows flames torching。
用 remains unclear 練替換：The cause remains unclear. / The schedule remains unclear.
用兩句英文複述：A fire broke out at a resort. Officials are still checking the number of injuries.

notes: 今日片段係 ABC News 約 1 分多鐘短新聞，主題係度假村火災；內容較嚴肅，所以只選清楚、短而可跟讀嘅記者句。
聽力重點係新聞常見結果句：leaving at least one tourist dead，以及 remains unclear。先抓主詞，再聽結果。
時間碼 00:18、00:25、00:35、01:03 可以逐句重播；每次先盲聽一次，再看稿跟讀兩次。
dailyLifePractice 會轉去較輕鬆嘅旅遊同日常協調場景，練安全、禮貌、實用嘅美式口語。

dailyLifePractice.title: Asking Hotel Staff
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你喺酒店想問職員設施位置同開放時間，語氣友善直接。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, could you tell me where the front desk is? Is the pool still open today? Thanks, I'll check there first.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, could you tell me where the front desk is?
lines.zh: 你好，可唔可以話我知前台喺邊？

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.en: Sure. It's right past the elevators.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Is the pool still open today?

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Could you tell me where...? 係好自然嘅問路句。right past the elevators 即過咗電梯少少，美國酒店、商場都常聽到。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 front desk 換成 lobby、gym 或 restaurant。
drills.example: Could you tell me where the gym is?

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 Is the pool still open today? 三次。
drills.example: Is the pool still open today?

dailyLifePractice.title: Changing Dinner Plans
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：旅行中臨時要改晚餐安排，想簡短通知朋友。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Small change of plans: the restaurant is packed. Want to grab something nearby instead? I found a place with good reviews.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Small change of plans: the restaurant is packed.
lines.zh: 計劃有少少改變：嗰間餐廳好多人。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.en: Okay, what do you want to do?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Want to grab something nearby instead?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I found a place with good reviews.
lines.zh: 我搵到一間評價幾好嘅。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Small change of plans 係自然又唔誇張嘅開場。grab something nearby 比 eat food nearby 更口語，適合朋友之間。

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 Small change of plans 開頭，講一個簡短改動。
drills.example: Small change of plans: the cafe is closed.

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 restaurant is packed 換成 line is too long、place is closed 或 weather looks bad。
drills.example: Small change of plans: the line is too long.

dailyLifePractice.title: Checking Safety Info
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你去新地方，想禮貌問清楚安全出口或集合地點。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Just checking, where's the nearest exit? If we need to meet outside, should we use the main entrance? Got it, thanks.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Just checking, where's the nearest exit?
lines.zh: 我想確認一下，最近嘅出口喺邊？

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.en: It's down the hall on your left.
lines.zh: 沿住走廊行，喺你左手邊。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: If we need to meet outside, should we use the main entrance?
lines.zh: 如果要喺出面集合，係咪用正門？

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Just checking 係柔和嘅確認開場，唔會聽落好緊張。Got it, thanks 係短而自然嘅回應，表示你明白咗。

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 Just checking 開頭問最近嘅洗手間喺邊。
drills.example: Just checking, where's the nearest restroom?

drills.label: Role-play
drills.prompt: 扮旅客，用一句話確認集合地點。
drills.example: Should we meet by the main entrance?
